message:
✨ Compact icon-only Diagnose/Repair buttons that open AI Missions (#662)

- Replace old CardActionButtons with unified CardAIActions component
- Diagnose (stethoscope) and Repair (wrench) now open AI Mission sidebar
- Compact icon-only style matching Predictive Health Monitor card
- Both buttons call startMission() with contextual prompts
- Applied consistently across 6 cards: ClusterHealth, PodIssues,
  DeploymentIssues, DeploymentStatus, SecurityIssues, AppStatus
- Removed legacy CardActionButtons component and exports

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
